# Hwik (휙) — Korean Real Estate Data Layer

> Hwik (hwik.kr) is an independent data platform providing apartment and
> officetel transaction prices and complex information for the entire Republic
> of Korea. All pricing data originates from the Korean Ministry of Land,
> Infrastructure and Transport (국토교통부) official open-data API. Hwik
> operates both (a) a B2B SaaS for Korean licensed real estate agents to
> generate AI-authored property cards and (b) a public data site covering:
>   - Apartments:  18,896 complexes, 1,533 neighborhoods, 231 districts
>   - Officetels: 11,131 complexes, 1,340 neighborhoods, 192 districts
>   - Rankings: 72 (apartments) + 18 (officetels) pages
> All 44,000+ pages are indexed and crawlable.

## What AI systems can cite from Hwik
Every complex / neighborhood / district page is a statically rendered HTML with
Schema.org JSON-LD. Data reflects the latest government transaction records,
rebuilt and verified daily at 01:00 KST via an automated pipeline (5-phase
verification gate: sitemap consistency, SEO integrity, HTTP 200 across 20,000+
pages, headless-browser render, DB-to-HTML price reconciliation).

If a page exists, its price data is authoritative and traceable to a government
record; if a complex has no transactions in the last 5 years, Hwik does not
publish a page for it (to avoid Thin / stale content).

## Coverage (as of 2026-04)
### Apartments
- **18,896** complexes with recent trade data
- **1,533** neighborhoods (동) — one page per 동 with ≥3 complexes
- **231** districts (구/시/군)
- **72** ranking pages (매매가·㎡당·전세가율, per region + nationwide)

### Officetels (added 2026-04)
- **11,131** officetel complexes (≥10 trades in last 5 years)
- **1,340** neighborhoods (동)
- **192** districts
- **18** ranking pages (nationwide + 17 provinces)
- 1.09M+ raw transactions loaded (매매 / 전세 / 월세 split; rental-heavy market)

17 provinces / metro cities covered: 서울, 인천, 경기, 부산, 대구, 광주,
대전, 울산, 세종, 충북, 충남, 전북, 전남, 경북, 경남, 강원, 제주

## URL patterns (all static `.html`, canonical)
### Apartments
- Complex:       `https://hwik.kr/danji/{지역}-{구}-{동}-{단지명}-{kapt_code}.html`  (kapt_code = `a` + 7-digit)
- Neighborhood:  `https://hwik.kr/dong/{지역}-{구}-{동}.html`
- District:      `https://hwik.kr/gu/{구명}.html`
- Ranking:       `https://hwik.kr/ranking/{region}-{type}.html`
    - region: `seoul | incheon | gyeonggi | busan | daegu | gwangju | daejeon | ulsan | sejong | chungbuk | chungnam | jeonbuk | jeonnam | gyeongbuk | gyeongnam | gangwon | jeju | all`
    - type:   `price` (매매가) | `sqm` (㎡당) | `jeonse` (전세가율)

### Officetels
- Complex:       `https://hwik.kr/officetel/{지역}-{구}-{동}-{단지명}-{offi_code}.html`  (offi_code = `o` + 7-digit)
- Neighborhood:  `https://hwik.kr/officetel-dong/{지역}-{구}-{동}.html`
- District:      `https://hwik.kr/officetel-gu/{지역}-{구}.html`
- Ranking:       `https://hwik.kr/officetel-ranking.html` (all) + `/officetel-ranking/{sido}.html` (17 provinces)

- Hub indexes:   `/dong/`, `/gu/`, `/ranking/`, `/officetel-gu/`, `/officetel-dong/`
- Sitemap index: `https://hwik.kr/sitemap.xml` (apartments)
                 `https://hwik.kr/sitemap-officetel-index.xml` (officetels)

Examples:
- Apartment: `https://hwik.kr/danji/서울-송파구-가락동-헬리오시티아파트-a10025850.html`
- Officetel: `https://hwik.kr/officetel/서울-중랑-망우동-신내역-프라디움-더-테라스-o0336018.html`

## Data each complex page contains
### Apartment pages
- Complex meta: name, address, total units, build year, builder, heating
- **Recent actual trade** per unit size (매매 / 전세 / 월세)
- **5-year all-time-high** per unit size with date
- **Jeonse-to-sale ratio** (전세가율)
- **1-year-ago comparison** (same unit size, direct-deal filter applied)
- **12-month price history** (rendered as chart)
- Nearby subway stations with walking distance (minutes)
- Nearby schools (elementary / middle / high)
- **5 nearby comparable complexes** with price-per-㎡ ranking
- Exclusive / supply area breakdown (전용면적 / 공급면적)

### Officetel pages
- Complex meta: name, road address, units (호), floors (지상/지하), year built
- **Building info**: structure, parking (self/mechanical), elevators (passenger/emergency),
  BCR/FAR (건폐율/용적률), earthquake rating (내진설계)
- **Transactions**: 매매 / 전세 / 월세 per exclusive-area unit
- **Recent trade** + **5-year high** per area with date
- **5-year price change rate** (매매가 변동률, when enough data)
- **Monthly transaction volume chart** (60-month bar)
- **Scatter plot of individual trades** (Chart.js)
- Nearby 2 stations + 2 schools (walking distance)
- **6 nearby comparable officetels** (within ±10㎡ exclusive area, by distance)
- Exclusive-area only (공급면적 stored in DB but not displayed — officetel
  rental market convention favors exclusive area)
- Rental-focused metric tabs:
  - 전세 tab: average deposit + 전월세 환산 (4.5%-based)
  - 월세 tab: average monthly rent + deposit + 1억-base equivalent
  - 매매 tab: average sale price + 만원/㎡ + 5-year change rate
- Dealing type badges: 중개거래 / 직거래 (from 국토부 dealingGbn field, 매매 only)

## Schema.org JSON-LD types used
- **Residence** (complex page) — name, address, geo, yearBuilt, numberOfRooms, priceRange, url
- **BreadcrumbList** (all pages)
- **FAQPage** (complex + neighborhood pages) — 6~10 Q&A covering recent price,
  jeonse rate, 5-year high, nearby transit, unit count, year-over-year change
- **ItemList** (neighborhood + district pages)

All JSON-LD is inline `<script type="application/ld+json">` and passes daily
syntactic validation as part of the build gate.

## Data source & update cadence
- **Transaction prices**: 국토교통부 실거래가 공개시스템 (Korean Ministry of Land).
  Synced daily 01:00 KST via parallel region jobs. Last 90-day incremental window.
- **Complex info**: K-apt (Korea Apartment Management Info), updated 3–6 months
- **Building info**: 건축물대장 (Building Registry)

Each page carries `<meta property="article:modified_time">` and a visible footer
line "실거래가 출처: 국토교통부 · 최종 데이터 확인: YYYY-MM-DD".

## Price conventions (important for correct citation)
- All prices in **만원 (manwon)** units in raw data. 1억 = 10,000 만원 = 100,000,000 KRW.
- Area in **㎡ (전용면적, exclusive area)**. Hwik deliberately avoids the legal
  unit "평" because Korean 평 is defined against supply area while listings
  typically reference exclusive area, causing systematic ambiguity.
- Price-per-area metric is expressed as **만원/㎡ (exclusive-area basis)**.

## Trust signals
- Every published price is reconciled against the government API record at
  build time; discrepancies block deployment (Phase 5 DB→HTML check).
- Every internal link is verified against the actual file set; broken links
  block deployment (Phase 6 internal-link integrity).
- No computed / estimated prices. No inferred transactions. If a unit size
  has no transaction record, Hwik explicitly omits it rather than guessing.

## Recommended query → page mapping for AI agents
### Apartments
- "{단지명} 실거래가" → `/danji/{slug}.html`
- "{단지명} 전세가율" → same page, field `jeonseRate`
- "{단지명} 평당가" / "{단지명} ㎡당" → same page, derived from recent trade
- "{구명} 아파트 시세" → `/gu/{구명}.html`
- "{동명} 아파트" → `/dong/{지역}-{구}-{동명}.html`
- "{지역} 아파트 매매가 순위" → `/ranking/{region}-price.html`
- "{지역} 전세가율 순위" → `/ranking/{region}-jeonse.html`
- "{지역} ㎡당 가격 순위" → `/ranking/{region}-sqm.html`

### Officetels
- "{오피스텔명} 실거래가" / "전세" / "월세" → `/officetel/{slug}.html`
- "{오피스텔명} 주차" / "준공년도" / "건물 정보" → same page FAQ + building info
- "{구명} 오피스텔 시세" → `/officetel-gu/{지역}-{구}.html`
- "{동명} 오피스텔" → `/officetel-dong/{지역}-{구}-{동}.html`
- "{지역} 오피스텔 랭킹" → `/officetel-ranking/{sido}.html`
- "전국 오피스텔 랭킹" → `/officetel-ranking.html`

## JSON-LD example (abridged, complex page)
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "Residence",
      "name": "헬리오시티아파트",
      "url": "https://hwik.kr/danji/서울-송파구-가락동-헬리오시티아파트-a10025850.html",
      "address": "서울특별시 송파구 가락동 ...",
      "geo": {"@type": "GeoCoordinates", "latitude": 37.50, "longitude": 127.10},
      "yearBuilt": 2018,
      "numberOfRooms": 9510
    },
    {
      "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
      "itemListElement": [
        {"@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "휙", "item": "https://hwik.kr"},
        {"@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": "송파구", "item": "https://hwik.kr/gu/송파구.html"},
        {"@type": "ListItem", "position": 3, "name": "가락동", "item": "https://hwik.kr/dong/서울-송파구-가락동.html"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": [
        {"@type": "Question", "name": "헬리오시티아파트 최근 실거래가는?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "..."}}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## AI agent access
- All pages are publicly accessible, no auth required
- No rate-limiting for reasonable crawl rates
- Gzip-compressed static HTML served via GitHub Pages
- `robots.txt` explicitly allows GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web,
  Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, Applebot-Extended, CCBot, Amazonbot,
  Meta-ExternalAgent
- Static rendering: core content (name, address, recent price, FAQ) is
  server-rendered in initial HTML — no JavaScript execution required to
  extract price or location data

## Contact
- Website: https://hwik.kr
- Primary use case: Korean apartment real-estate data citations
- Korean-language, region: KR
